translations.01KQXQV12DRWGK4WRBAETK8CBX: 离线，正在尝试重新连接……
translations.01KQXQV12AYMX1VYRKK5012BNW: 无法使用计算机操作：未检测到受支持的显示服务器。需要 X11 或 Wayland。

notes: warpify.rs/warpify_footer.rs: 'Warpify SSH session' is a banner title + button label (UI) -> translate, keep brand-derived 'Warpify' and 'SSH'. adapter.rs: 'Offline, trying to reconnect...' is Banner formatted text (UI) -> translate, '...' -> '……'. theme_deletion_body.rs: MODAL_SUBHEADER dialog text (UI) -> translate. wasm_nux_dialog.rs: 'shared sessions' is object_kind noun phrase filling {} in 'Always open {object_kind} on the web?' (UI) -> translate as noun phrase. global_search/model.rs: 'Global search failed.' emitted as GlobalSearchEvent::Failed error surfaced to user (UI) -> translate. computer_use/linux/mod.rs: capability error returned to caller, user-facing -> translate; line-continuation collapses to one line; preserved X11/Wayland. ordered_list.rs / clap.rs / headless+winit delegate.rs / scrollable.rs: all .expect(...) assertion strings -> panic_message, target null. registry.rs: 'System theme value {theme_value:?} was invalid' is format!() wrapped into io::Error (developer/log-facing diagnostic with :? debug placeholder, not rendered UI) -> telemetry_payload, target null.
